summary: All three requirements are implemented. REQ-1 is satisfied by the static data structure in frontend/src/data/legalReferences.ts with Highway Code rules including enforceable/advisory flags and visual badge distinction. REQ-2 is satisfied by RTA 1988 sections with section numbers and plain-English descriptions in the same file. REQ-3 is satisfied by the collapsible LegalReferencePanel component integrated into ReportDetail.tsx, defaulting to collapsed state with a chevron toggle, showing relevant references per violations, and handling the no-violations case.

hallucinated_features.description: GENERAL_LEGAL_REFERENCES merged into all panels regardless of violations
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires showing references relevant to the violations recorded in the report. The implementation also merges a separate GENERAL_LEGAL_REFERENCES set into every panel, which was not requested.
